name: Patient Name
history: Spent about one year working on a project in Europe involving building a website and conducting interviews. Reports pride in the work and a wish to share the results. Past history of procrastination and anxiety. Uses strategies learned from a course and reminders to manage daily life.
intermediate_belief: I need to be perfect to be competent.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I make a mistake, it means I am a failure.
coping_strategies: Uses energy shots to stay awake for work, relies on reminders and strategies from a course to manage daily life.
situation: Facing ambiguity about life direction and choices, with many options to consider.
auto_thought: I can't believe I messed up the order; I am so incompetent.
behavior: Crying spells at work, difficulty sleeping, using energy shots to stay awake.
